en: There are, Your Honour. And please remember that all fines will go towards funding
ko: 모든 벌금은 이번 주 일요일 레스토랑에서 열리는 시즌 종료 파티 자금으로 사용됩니다.

en: our end-of-season party this Sunday night at the restaurant.
Very well. Bailiff, please bring forth the receptacle.
ko: 어, 보조 키트 관리자가 가지고 있습니다.

en: Er, the assistant kit man has it.
Assistant to the kit man, that was. Court Treasurer, release the fines.
Janmas, late for training, £200. Oh, wow.
ko: 대니 로하스, 팀원 생일에 생일 축하 문자를 보내지 않음, £100. 이의 있습니다, 재판장님.

en: Danny Rojas, not texting happy birthday on a teammate's birthday, £100.
ko: 다른 사람의 생일에 작은 하트를 넣었어요. 기각합니다.

en: Objection, Your Honour. I did put a tiny little heart on someone else's happy birthday.
Jamie Tatt, falling asleep during team meditation training, £200.
Huh? Wow. You fell asleep? No, everyone was sleeping, man. Not me.
I was just the only one who was snoring.
